Generator validation error: SKO formulation validation failed:

  - Link 'base_link' has no valid inertia definition (neither direct inertia nor body with inertia)
  - Link 'second_link' has no valid inertia definition (neither direct inertia nor body with inertia)

For SKO formulation, please ensure your model has:
  1. At least one properly named link with pose information
  2. Valid inertia definitions (either direct or through bodies)
  3. Proper model structure for code generation
